thi6:1.0.127: "Yassa maggaṁ na jānāsi,āgatassa gatassa vā;Taṁ kutocāgataṁsattaṁ,‘mama putto’ti rodasi.
thi6:1.0.128: p_19Th2_183Maggañcakhossajānāsi,āgatassa gatassa vā;Na naṁ samanusocesi,evaṁdhammā hi pāṇino.
thi6:1.0.129: p_19Th2_184Ayācito tatāgacchi,nānuññātoito gato;Kutoci nūna āgantvā,vasitvā katipāhakaṁ;Itopi aññena gato,tatopaññena gacchati.
thi6:1.0.130: p_19Th2_185Peto manussarūpena,saṁsaranto gamissati;Yathāgato tathā gato,kā tattha paridevanā".
thi6:1.0.131: p_19Th2_186"Abbahīvata me sallaṁ,duddasaṁ hadayassitaṁ;Yā me sokaparetāya,puttasokaṁ byapānudi.
thi6:1.0.132: p_19Th2_187Sājja abbūḷhasallāhaṁ,Nicchātā parinibbutā;Buddhaṁ dhammañca saṁghañca,Upemi saraṇaṁ muniṁ".
thi6:1.0.133: p_19Th2_189"Puttasokenahaṁ aṭṭā,khittacittā visaññinī;Naggā pakiṇṇakesī ca,tena tena vicārihaṁ.
thi6:1.0.136: p_19Th2_192Sacittaṁ paṭiladdhāna,vanditvāna upāvisiṁ;So me dhammamadesesi,anukampāya gotamo.
thi6:1.0.137: p_19Th2_193Tassa dhammaṁ suṇitvāna,pabbajiṁ anagāriyaṁ;Yuñjantī satthuvacane,sacchākāsiṁ padaṁ sivaṁ.
thi6:1.0.138: p_19Th2_194Sabbe sokā samucchinnā,pahīnā etadantikā;Pariññātā hi me vatthū,yato sokāna sambhavo"ti.
thi6:1.0.139: p_19Th2_196"Daharā tvaṁ rūpavatī,ahampi daharo yuvā;Pañcaṅgikenaturiyena,ehi kheme ramāmase".
thi6:1.0.141: p_19Th2_198Sattisūlūpamā kāmā,khandhāsaṁ adhikuṭṭanā;Yaṁ ‘tvaṁ kāmaratiṁ’ brūsi,‘aratī’ dāni sā mama.
thi6:1.0.142: p_19Th2_199Sabbattha vihatā nandī,tamokhandho padālito;Evaṁ jānāhi pāpima,nihato tvamasi antaka.
thi6:1.0.146: p_19Th2_204Annaṁ pānañca ādāya,khajjaṁ bhojjaṁ anappakaṁ;Gehato nikkhamitvāna,uyyānamabhihārayiṁ.
thi6:1.0.147: p_19Th2_205Tattha ramitvā kīḷitvā,āgacchantī sakaṁ gharaṁ;Vihāraṁ daṭṭhuṁ pāvisiṁ,sākete añjanaṁ vanaṁ.
thi6:1.0.148: p_19Th2_206Disvāna lokapajjotaṁ,vanditvāna upāvisiṁ;So me dhammamadesesi,anukampāya cakkhumā.
thi6:1.0.149: p_19Th2_207Sutvā ca kho mahesissa,saccaṁ sampaṭivijjhahaṁ;Tattheva virajaṁ dhammaṁ,phusayiṁ amataṁ padaṁ.
thi6:1.0.150: p_19Th2_208Tato viññātasaddhammā,pabbajiṁ anagāriyaṁ;Tisso vijjā anuppattā,amoghaṁ buddhasāsanan"ti.
thi6:1.0.151: p_19Th2_210"Ucce kule ahaṁ jātā,bahuvitte mahaddhane;Vaṇṇarūpena sampannā,dhītāmajjhassaatrajā.
thi6:1.0.152: p_19Th2_211Patthitā rājaputtehi,seṭṭhiputtehi gijjhitā;Pitu me pesayī dūtaṁ,detha mayhaṁ anopamaṁ.
thi6:1.0.153: p_19Th2_212Yattakaṁ tulitā esā,tuyhaṁ dhītā anopamā;Tato aṭṭhaguṇaṁ dassaṁ,hiraññaṁ ratanāni ca.
thi6:1.0.154: p_19Th2_213Sāhaṁ disvāna sambuddhaṁ,lokajeṭṭhaṁ anuttaraṁ;Tassa pādāni vanditvā,ekamantaṁ upāvisiṁ.
thi6:1.0.155: p_19Th2_214So me dhammamadesesi,anukampāya gotamo;Nisinnā āsane tasmiṁ,phusayiṁ tatiyaṁ phalaṁ.
thi6:1.0.156: p_19Th2_215Tato kesāni chetvāna,pabbajiṁ anagāriyaṁ;Ajja me sattamī ratti,yato taṇhā visositā"ti.
thi6:1.0.157: p_19Th2_217"Buddha vīra namo tyatthu,sabbasattānamuttama;Yo maṁ dukkhā pamocesi,aññañca bahukaṁ janaṁ.
